html:
Your Personalized Recovery Plan

Rachelle’s shedding has been coming in waves—clear proof that the root causes have been fluctuating too. Ongoing stress and periods of under‑fueling kept hair cycling patterns unstable, but that’s already shifting. This phase moves her from early regrowth toward steady thickening by anchoring sleep, calming stress responses, and rebuilding nutrition foundations. The focus now is restoring rhythm and giving new hairs the chance to grow strong and stay. 🌱

Stay consistent—each calm night and balanced meal strengthens visible regrowth.
